name: forge-harness
description: Marketplace do Forge Project Harness — distribui o plugin `forge` com os slash commands /forge:* (SDD, waves, code graph, docs, manutenção do harness).

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: Slash commands /forge:* do Forge Project Harness — SDD spec lifecycle, waves, code graph, docs/ADRs e manutenção do harness. O engine .forge/ por projeto vem de `npx forge-harness init`.
